name: Disney Store Official Buzz Lightyear Interactive Talking Action Figure from Toy Story, Features 10+ English Phrases, Interacts with Other Figures and Toys
bullets: Interactive Buzz Lightyear: This Buzz Lightyear action figure brings Toy Story toys to life. Press the blue, red, and green buttons to hear over 10 phrases to enhance playtime adventures.
Wing Release & Laser Effects: Press the button for an exciting wing release and flashing laser lights. This action-packed feature makes it an ideal choice among Buzz lightyear toys.
Arm Laser & Karate Chop: Activate the arm laser button for dynamic light and sound effects, while the wings button triggers Buzz's karate chop action. These features make it a standout Buzz toy.
Fully Articulated Design: With fully articulated joints, this Buzz Lightyear figure from the Toy Story enhances playtime, perfect for recreating scenes from the movie.
Interacts with Other Figures: When this Buzz Lightyear action figure toy can interact with other characters from the franchise, unlocking additional phrases for an enriched play experience.

reviews.name: Ranman2u
reviews.title: This is a really cool toy that will provide a child with endless movies recreations and more
reviews.body: Wow she's really big toy! Very cool features for the extra money from the next doll down and worth it! They interact with each other Woody and Bud light Year and the horse

reviews.name: Mabel S.
reviews.title: The perfect Toy Story companion for little fans
reviews.body: I bought this Jessie doll for my granddaughter because she is absolutely obsessed with her brother’s Buzz Lightyear and wanted a Toy Story friend of her own. It was the perfect choice! The doll is adorable, well made, and looks just like Jessie from the movies.

reviews.name: J. Shopper
reviews.title: A Favourite of Ours
reviews.body: I would recommend this toy if you have a Forky fan! He has held up pretty well after heavy use, which I was a little shocked by as it looks fragile.

reviews.name: Ladiesman217
reviews.title: Worth it!
reviews.body: This toy is really cool though even though there are some features that I was hoping that it comes with this figure, nonetheless, it made my inner child happy. It has a very good quality, the voice lines that it makes works well and the coolest part for me with this figure is that it can interact with my other toys (woody, jessie, and bullseye). Overall, I love this and this will live with me for…
